mapper.select:
SELECT (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0) FROM bookings b JOIN payments p ON b.booking_id = p.booking_id WHERE b.hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND p.payment_status = 'PAID' AND p.paid_at BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}) AS totalRevenue,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings b WHERE b.hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND b.cancelled_at IS NULL AND b.check_in_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}) AS bookingCount,
(SELECT COALESCE(SUM(b.nights), 0) FROM bookings b WHERE b.hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND b.cancelled_at IS NULL AND b.check_in_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}) AS totalNights

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT b.user_id) = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN prev.booking_id IS NOT NULL THEN b.user_id END) * 100.0) / COUNT(DISTINCT b.user_id) END as returningRate FROM bookings b LEFT JOIN bookings prev ON b.user_id = prev.user_id AND b.hotel_id = prev.hotel_id AND prev.check_out_date <= b.check_in_date AND prev.cancelled_at IS NULL WHERE b.hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND b.cancelled_at IS NULL AND b.check_in_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT b.user_id) = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN prev.booking_id IS NOT NULL THEN b.user_id END) * 100.0) / COUNT(DISTINCT b.user_id) END as vipReturningRate FROM bookings b JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN bookings prev ON b.user_id = prev.user_id AND b.hotel_id = prev.hotel_id AND prev.check_out_date <= b.check_in_date AND prev.cancelled_at IS NULL WHERE b.hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND b.cancelled_at IS NULL AND u.Membership = 'VIP' AND b.check_in_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(p.paid_at, '%Y-%m') as yearMonth, SUM(p.amount) as revenue FROM bookings b JOIN payments p ON b.booking_id = p.booking_id WHERE b.hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND p.payment_status = 'PAID' AND p.paid_at >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(p.paid_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY yearMonth ASC

SELECT r.room_type_id as roomTypeId, COALESCE(rt.name, r.room_type_id) as roomTypeName, COUNT(DISTINCT r.room_id) as roomCount, COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0) as revenue FROM rooms r LEFT JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = CAST(rt.room_type_id AS CHAR) LEFT JOIN bookings b ON r.room_id = b.room_id AND b.cancelled_at IS NULL AND b.check_in_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} LEFT JOIN payments p ON b.booking_id = p.booking_id AND p.payment_status = 'PAID' WHERE r.호텔아이디 = #{hotelId} AND r.is_active = TRUE GROUP BY r.room_type_id, rt.name
